summary: Completed comprehensive testing of User-Capture-Auth feature. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified working: Login page with Sign In/Register tabs, Registration flow, Login flow, Link Player page, Dashboard access after linking, and Logout flow.
passed_tests: Backend: API health check - /api/ returns 200
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Creates new user with email/password
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Rejects duplicate email (400)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Authenticates valid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Rejects invalid password (401)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Rejects non-existent user (401)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns current user when authenticated
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns 401 when not authenticated
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout - Clears session and cookies
Backend: GET /api/auth/available-players - Returns list when authenticated
Backend: GET /api/auth/available-players - Returns 401 when not authenticated
Backend: Admin login with seeded credentials (admin@scoretracker.com)
Backend: POST /api/auth/link-player - Links player to authenticated user
Backend: POST /api/auth/link-player - Returns 404 for non-existent player
Backend: POST /api/auth/link-player - Returns 401 when not authenticated
Backend: Brute force protection - Login failure handling verified
Frontend: Login page loads with Sign In and Register tabs
Frontend: Login form has email, password inputs and submit button
Frontend: Register form has name, email, password inputs and submit button
Frontend: Login with admin credentials redirects to Link Player page
Frontend: Link Player page shows available players list
Frontend: Link Player page has 'Link Existing Player' and 'Create New Player' tabs
Frontend: Linking player redirects to Dashboard
Frontend: Success toast 'Player profile linked successfully!' displayed
Frontend: Registration creates account and redirects to Link Player page
Frontend: Success toast 'Account created! Please link your player profile.' displayed
Frontend: Create New Player form has society join code, player name, handicap inputs
Frontend: Logout redirects to login page
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth endpoints properly implemented with JWT tokens stored in httpOnly cookies
bcrypt hash format correctly starts with $2b$ (verified)
CORS configured with allow_credentials=True and explicit origins
Brute force protection implemented with IP+email identifier and 15-minute lockout after 5 failed attempts
Admin user seeded on startup with password update if changed in .env
Frontend properly uses withCredentials:true for axios requests
Auth context correctly manages authUser (account) and user (linked player) states
Protected routes properly redirect based on auth state and player link status

test_credentials.test_accounts_created: Multiple test accounts created during testing with random emails

seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded via startup event. Test users created during testing are ephemeral.
context_for_next_testing_agent: User-Capture-Auth feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, POST /api/auth/logout, GET /api/auth/me, GET /api/auth/available-players, POST /api/auth/link-player. JWT tokens stored in httpOnly cookies (access_token: 15min, refresh_token: 7 days). Frontend: LoginPage.jsx has Sign In/Register tabs with data-testid attributes. LinkPlayerPage.jsx has Link Existing/Create New tabs. Auth flow: Login -> Link Player (if no linked player) -> Dashboard. Admin account linked to TestAdmin player during testing.
